issue_summary: Change int methods from deprecated to exception throwng
javadoc_before:
/** * The number of bytes that have passed through this stream. *

* WARNING This method will return an * incorrect count for files over 2GB - use * getByteCount() instead. * * @return the number of bytes accumulated * @deprecated use getByteCount() - see issue IO-84 */
javadoc_after:
/** * The number of bytes that have passed through this stream. *

* NOTE: From v1.3 this method throws an ArithmeticException if the * count is greater than can be expressed by an int. * See {@link #getByteCount()} for a method using a long. * * @return the number of bytes accumulated * @throws ArithmeticException if the byte count is too large */
